'''Bonadan''' was the primary [[Red giant/Legends|red giant]]<ref name="Emissary of the Void">"[[Emissary of the Void]]"</ref> star of the [[Bonadan system/Legends|Bonadan system]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{Star-stub}}
